PORT_DESC: The port on which the Stylish Player web interface is served.
NOW_PLAYING_URL_DESC: The URL to access the Stylish Player interface.
PLAYER_TYPE_DESC: Select which player visual is displayed on the left side of the home screen. Long pressing (or double clicking) the player visual will toggle between the different player types.
LATITUDE_DESC: Latitude of your location (e.g. 51.5074 for London). Used for weather data.
LONGITUDE_DESC: Longitude of your location (e.g. -0.1278 for London). Used for weather data.
WEATHER_API_KEY_DESC: Open-Meteo API key. The free tier does not require a key. Only needed for commercial plans.
UNIT_SYSTEM_DESC: Metric uses °C and km/h. Imperial uses °F and mph.
IDLE_SCREEN_TYPE_DESC: Which screen to display when playback has been idle for the configured timeout.
IDLE_TIMEOUT_DESC: Minutes of inactivity (no music playing) before switching to the idle screen. Set to 0 to disable.
SHOW_WEATHER_IN_CLOCK_DESC: When a clock is selected as the idle screen, display the current weather on the clock face.
ANALOG_CLOCK_SHOW_DATE_DESC: Display the current date on the analog clock face. Disable for small screens.
UNSPLASH_API_KEY_DESC: Your Unsplash API access key. Required when using Unsplash API URLs for wallpapers. Get one at unsplash.com/developers.
WALLPAPER_URL_DESC: URL of a wallpaper image, or an Unsplash API URL that returns photos. Multiple images will cycle as a slideshow.
WALLPAPER_SHOW_TIME_DESC: Display the current time overlaid on the wallpaper.
WALLPAPER_SHOW_SECONDS_DESC: Include seconds in the time overlay.
WALLPAPER_SHOW_WEATHER_DESC: Display current weather conditions overlaid on the wallpaper.
SLIDESHOW_INTERVAL_DESC: Time in seconds between wallpaper transitions when multiple images are available. Minimum 5 seconds.
